name: ExtensionElementDefinition_Slicing_Discriminator_Type
title: R5: value | exists | type | profile | position
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ElementDefinition.slicing.discriminator.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ElementDefinition.slicing.discriminator.type` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ElementDefinition.slicing.discriminator.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `ElementDefinition.slicing.discriminator.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `ElementDefinition.slicing.discriminator.type` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ElementDefinition.slicing.discriminator.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ElementDefinition.slicing.discriminator.type` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: value | exists | type | profile | position
element.comment:
Element `ElementDefinition.slicing.discriminator.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ElementDefinition.slicing.discriminator.type` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
'pattern' is deprecated - it works exactly the same as 'value'.

element.definition: How the element value is interpreted when discrimination is evaluated.
element.comment: 'pattern' is deprecated - it works exactly the same as 'value'.
